# Request for Quotation

**RFQ Reference:** RFQ-2024-0312
**Issue Date:** 2024-02-28
**Issuing Organization:** Metro City Public Works Department
**Submission Deadline:** 2024-03-28 17:00 EST
**Contact Person:** Maria Rodriguez
**Project Title:** Downtown Water Main Replacement Phase III
**Currency:** USD

## Scope of Work

The City of Metro requests quotations for the supply and installation of 2,400 linear feet of 12-inch ductile iron water main pipe including all fittings, valves, and connections.

**Notes:** All bidders must be pre-qualified. Site visit scheduled for March 5, 2024 at 10:00 AM.
